α : Type u_1
sel : Set α → Option α
⊢ ∀ {s : Set α} {n₁ n₂ : ℕ},
    Nat.brecOn (motive := fun x => Set α → Option α) n₁
          (fun x f x_1 =>
            (match (motive := Set α → (x : ℕ) → Nat.below (motive := fun x => Set α → Option α) x → Option α) x_1,
                x with
              | s, 0 => fun x => sel s
              | s, n.succ => fun x => do
                let a ← sel s
                x.fst.fst (s \ {a}))
              f)
          s =
        none →
      n₁ ≤ n₂ →
        Nat.brecOn (motive := fun x => Set α → Option α) n₂
            (fun x f x_1 =>
              (match (motive := Set α → (x : ℕ) → Nat.below (motive := fun x => Set α → Option α) x → Option α) x_1,
                  x with
                | s, 0 => fun x => sel s
                | s, n.succ => fun x => do
                  let a ← sel s
                  x.fst.fst (s \ {a}))
                f)
            s =
          none
